rulings.Case Title: TERILYN JOE et al VS. 1520 TAYLOR STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION, A et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Mtn For Order Resolving Settlement Dispute
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 23, 2014, line 1. DEFENDANT 1520 TAYLOR STREET CONDOMINIUM ASSOCIATION's Motion For Order Resolving Settlement Dispute Continued to January 13, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to Department 501 no later than December 31, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. Opposing party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the opposition to department 501 no later than December 31, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Case Title: TERILYN JOE et al VS. 1520 TAYLOR STREET HOMEOWNERS ASSOCIATION, A et al
rulings.Calendar Matter: Ntc Of Mtn To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Enter Judgment
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 23, 2014, line 1. PLAINTIFFs TERILYN JOE and LINDA LUOMA's Motion To Enforce Settlement Agreement And Enter Judgment Continued to January 13, 2015. Moving party is ordered to comply with SFLR 2.6B and provide courtesy copy of the moving papers to Department 501 no later than December 31, 2014 with a cover letter reflecting new hearing date. = (501/RBU)

rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR ATTORNEY FEES AND EXPENSES

rulings.Case Title: HECTOR FLORES VS. BRIDGET DILLMAN ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT, UNLAWFUL DETAINER
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for Tuesday, December 23, 2014, line 13. DEFENDANTs BRIDGET DILLMAN and GENARO SCARZEGA's MOTION FOR SUMMARY JUDGMENT DENIED. Moving party provides no evidence re: applicability of SFRO and cites no authority for the proposition that compliance with/exemption from SFRO is an element of prima facie case vs. affirmative defense. = (501/RBU)
